domain: Latvian dievturība pre-Christian Baltic pagan tradition: 8-spoke Saule solar wheel (4 major Saulgrieži solstices+equinoxes + 4 minor cross-quarter) with 13-lunar-month alternate counting reconciled via leap-Jāņi; Saulgrieži ritual phase-anchoring realigns lunar-solar drift quarterly; Dievturība reconstructionist Latvian religion
specific_mechanism: DIEVTURIBA-8-SOLAR-13-LUNAR-PHASE-DUAL-RING: per-attention-head dual-ring RoPE with (1) 8-phase solar-anchor ring R_solar: 8 discrete phase positions θ = -π/4 × k for k=0..7 as anchor frequencies on K_solar attention heads; positions snap to nearest solar spoke during alignment; (2) 13-phase lunar-drift ring R_lunar: 13-position fractional-phase ring θ_l = 2π·l/13 for l=0..12 on K_lunar separate heads; tracks slower lunar context drift; (3) Saulgrieži leap-adjust gate G_grieži: 4 anchor positions {τ_winter, τ_summer, τ_spring, τ_autumn} where lunar phase is reset to nearest solar 8-spoke; mitigates lunar-solar drift over long context; (4) dual-ring coherence loss L_coh = λ_s·Σ_solar||θ_s - nearest_8_spoke||² + λ_l·Σ_lunar||θ_l - 2π·k/13||² encourages quantization-on-rings; (5) phase-mismatch detection at decode: |θ_observed - θ_expected| > τ_mis triggers phase-renorm. Differs from R477 LAUNEDDAS-TRIPLE-LOCK (3-head drone+2-melody triplet + EMA-drone + drift loss, no 8-13 dual-ring + no Saulgrieži) and R490 BOUZOUKI-TETRACHORD-COUPLE (4-course octave-unison + V-scale-2x, no 8-13 dual-ring) and R502 CASTELL-PINYA-TRONC-PHASE-RISE (2-phase build schedule + 9-head ring + collapse-safety, no 8-13 dual-ring) and R515 HULA-HALAU-KUMU-ALAKAI (3-tier phase-lag-lock, no dual-ring) by 8-phase solar-anchor + 13-phase lunar-drift + Saulgrieži leap-adjust gate + dual-ring coherence loss.
llm_application: DIEVTURIBA-8-SOLAR-13-LUNAR-PHASE-DUAL-RING per-attention-head dual-ring RoPE with 8-phase solar-anchor ring K_solar heads + 13-phase lunar-drift ring K_lunar heads + Saulgrieži leap-adjust gate 4-anchor lunar-to-nearest-solar reset + dual-ring coherence loss L_coh + phase-mismatch decode renorm. Differs from R094. R426. R472. R477 LAUNEDDAS-TRIPLE-LOCK (closest — 3-head drone+2-melody). R490 BOUZOUKI-TETRACHORD-COUPLE (closest — 4-course octave-unison). R502 CASTELL-PINYA-TRONC-PHASE-RISE (closest — 2-phase build). R515 HULA-HALAU-KUMU-ALAKAI (closest — 3-tier phase-lag-lock). Differs from TAPA + RoPE per-head distribution + Block-Attention + TidalDecode by 8-spoke + 13-phase dual-ring + Saulgrieži leap-adjust. Differs by 8-PHASE SOLAR-ANCHOR + 13-PHASE LUNAR-DRIFT + SAULGRIEŽI LEAP-ADJUST GATE + DUAL-RING COHERENCE LOSS + PHASE-MISMATCH DECODE RENORM.
novelty_claim: TAPA Token-Aware Phase Attention 2509.12635 + RoPE variants + Block-Attention 2409.15355 + TidalDecode ICLR 2025 cover phase encoding + per-head distribution space. DIEVTURIBA-8-SOLAR-13-LUNAR-PHASE-DUAL-RING adds (a) 8-phase discrete solar-anchor ring quantization + (b) 13-phase fractional lunar-drift ring co-existing + (c) Saulgrieži 4-anchor leap-adjust gate + (d) dual-ring coherence loss + (e) phase-mismatch decode renorm. Recombination — borderline lookup.
